member.name: M:backendTest.Controllers.MyOfficeAcpdController.CreateAcpdData(ACPDDto)
member.remarks: 測試用 JSON： { "acpdSid": "USER20260331001", "acpdCname": "王小明", "acpdEname": "Kevin Wang", "acpdSname": "小明", "acpdEmail": "kevin.wang@example.com", "acpdStatus": 1, "acpdStop": false, "acpdStopMemo": null, "acpdLoginId": "kevin_001", "acpdLoginPwd": "Password123!", "acpdMemo": "這是後端測試用範例帳號", "acpdNowDateTime": "2026-03-31T15:00:00", "acpdNowId": "ADMIN_01", "acpdUpdDateTime": "2026-03-31T15:30:00", "acpdUpdId": "ADMIN_01" }

member.name: M:backendTest.Controllers.MyOfficeAcpdController.UpdateAcpdData(System.String,ACPDDto)
member.remarks: 測試用 JSON： { "acpdSid": "需要修改的Id", -------------------------- 以下為修改內容 "acpdCname": "王小明", "acpdEname": "Kevin Wang", "acpdSname": "小明", "acpdEmail": "kevin.wang@example.com", "acpdStatus": 1, "acpdStop": false, "acpdStopMemo": null, "acpdLoginId": "kevin_001", "acpdLoginPwd": "Password123!", "acpdMemo": "這是後端測試用範例帳號", "acpdNowDateTime": "2026-03-31T15:00:00", "acpdNowId": "ADMIN_01", "acpdUpdDateTime": "2026-03-31T15:30:00", "acpdUpdId": "ADMIN_01" }
